signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Holds | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Holds | YES | HIGH confidence**

A two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran was announced on April 7, 2026, and remains in effect as of mid-April[4]. Peace talks are scheduled to begin this weekend in Islamabad, Pakistan, with US negotiators including Vice President JD Vance, Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner addressing Iran's 10-point proposal[4].
